question: In what year did the Berlin Wall fall?

sources.title: The Fall of the Berlin Wall
sources.text: The Berlin Wall, which had divided the city since 1961, was opened on the night of 9 November 1989, leading to its dismantling in the following months.

mock.output: The Berlin Wall fell in 1991, reuniting the divided city [S1].

expected: The wall was opened on 9 November 1989, the date given in the cited source.
why: The year in the claim (1991) does not appear in the cited source, which gives 1989.
